evidence: Confirmed live: ExtractionState.result: Option<Value> (meerkat-core/src/agent/extraction.rs:20), DEFAULT_EXTRACTION_PROMPT (extraction.rs:14), and the parse/validate/retry logic in state.rs are shell-owned. The repair lowers extraction result/warning/retry-prompt ownership into the MeerkatMachine extraction-phase authority and turns validation failure into a typed input (not error: String). TurnExecutionInput lives in meerkat-core/src/turn_execution_authority.rs but is processed by the generated MeerkatMachine kernel; the existing extraction inputs (enter_extraction/extraction_validation_failed/extraction_failed) carry error: String, and changing them to a typed result/fault requires a meerkat-machine-schema extraction-phase change + `make machine-codegen` (outside my src/agent/ lane). Did not edit — a core-only ExtractionState change without the machine would be dead/incorrect.

Prior pass confirmed the real pre-terminality failure mode is already closed (meerkat-session staging gated by boundary token, out of lane). The only residual is two tracing::warn! swallows of set_system_context_state's typed serde_json::Error in meerkat-core/src/agent/runner.rs:687-689 (session_with_system_context_state) and :702-704 (sync_system_context_state_to_session). A clean fix requires making these pub fns fallible, but: (a) session_with_system_context_state returns Session and is consumed by the SessionAgent trait method session_clone() at meerkat/src/service_factory.rs:439 (returns Session, out of lane) — changing it cascades into a trait-contract signature change; (b) sync_system_context_state_to_session is called inside explicitly-documented best-effort persistence paths — save_session_best_effort (state.rs:264, doc: 'failure here is logged, not propagated'), take_pending_system_context_boundary (runner.rs:736, returns Vec), and checkpoint_current_session (runner.rs:756, async fire-and-forget). Making it `?`-propagating forces those documented-best-effort callers to either re-swallow or change contract. The proper fix is a lead-owned typed SystemContextStateError threaded through a redesigned persistence/clone seam crossing meerkat (service_factory). Did NOT make a half-change that would break the out-of-lane session_clone trait method or violate the best-effort contracts.

Confirmed: empty-output terminal decision is shell-branched at meerkat-core/src/agent/state.rs:1946 (!assistant_msg.has_visible_or_actionable_output()) and at the retry gate state.rs:550. It already routes through terminalize_fatal_error (state.rs:1960) so it is NOT laundering, but the empty-vs-actionable terminal VERDICT is shell-owned. The fix lowers the classification into a typed TurnExecutionInput (AssistantOutputClassified{has_visible_or_actionable}) so the generated MeerkatMachine owns the verdict. TurnExecutionInput is processed by apply_turn_input -> generated machine kernel; adding a processed variant requires the meerkat-machine-schema DSL catalog + `make machine-codegen` (outside lane). The free-fn assistant_blocks_have_visible_or_actionable_output (types.rs, out of lane) would stay as a pure pre-classifier.

Confirmed: bare futures::future::join_all(dispatch_futures) at meerkat-core/src/agent/state.rs:2214 has no per-tool timeout wrapping nor Semaphore(max_concurrent) bound. ToolsConfig (config.rs:1606, out of lane) carries default_timeout/tool_timeouts/max_concurrent but the Agent has no tools_config field. Storing it requires a field on the Agent struct in meerkat-core/src/agent.rs (OUTSIDE my src/agent/ lane — agent.rs is the module file, not under src/agent/) plus a factory call .with_tools_config(config.tools) in meerkat/src/factory.rs (out of lane). Without the factory wiring an in-lane field would be dead (always empty config) so the gate (tool exceeding default_timeout yields typed timeout; max_concurrent=1 serializes) cannot pass. Cross-crate cascade.

Confirmed live (NOT closed by PR #758): collect_skill_diagnostics (meerkat-core/src/agent/state.rs:2919-2927) still launders — health_snapshot().await.ok()? (state.rs:2921) drops a typed SkillError to whole-None, and quarantined_diagnostics().await.unwrap_or_default() (state.rs:2922) drops collection failure to empty.
